lines.speaker: Lawyer
lines.sourceText: Your matter will return to court next week
lines.targetText: U saak sal volgende week teruggaan hof toe

lines.speaker: Client
lines.targetText: Op watter datum moet ek kom

lines.speaker: Lawyer
lines.sourceText: Please come on Tuesday at nine o'clock

lines.speaker: Lawyer
lines.sourceText: Bring your identity document and all your papers
lines.targetText: Bring u identiteitsdokument en al u papiere

lines.speaker: Lawyer
lines.sourceText: Please contact me if you have questions
lines.targetText: Kontak my asseblief as u vrae het
